attributes.title: [NVIDIA GPU OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Fleet-level overview of NVIDIA GPU health and performance via DCGM OTel metrics. Covers temperature, utilization, memory, power, errors, and clock frequencies.

params.markdown:
## [NVIDIA GPU OTel] Overview

This dashboard provides a fleet-level overview of NVIDIA GPU health and performance:
- GPU count, models, and driver versions
- Temperature and thermal health
- Compute and memory utilization
- Framebuffer memory usage
- Power consumption
- XID hardware errors
- Clock frequencies and throttling indicators

query.esql:
FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP IS NOT NULL
| STATS gpu_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(UUID)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP IS NOT NULL
| STATS gpu_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(UUID)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_temp = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_temp = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_temp = MAX(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_temp = MAX(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_util = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_util = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_power = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_power = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_XID_ERRORS IS NOT NULL
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_XID_ERRORS > 0
| STATS error_gpus = COUNT_DISTINCT(UUID)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_XID_ERRORS IS NOT NULL
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_XID_ERRORS > 0
| STATS error_gpus = COUNT_DISTINCT(UUID)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_COPY_UTIL IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_mem_util = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_COPY_UTIL)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_COPY_UTIL IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_mem_util = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_COPY_UTIL)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_fb_used = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_fb_used = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED)

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_temp = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), UUID
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_temp = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), UUID
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE IS NOT NULL

| SORT time_bucket ASC

| STATS avg_power = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), UUID

| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_ENC_UTIL IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_enc = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_ENC_UTIL) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), UUID

| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_ENC_UTIL IS NOT NULL

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_DEC_UTIL IS NOT NULL

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_fb_used = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), UUID

| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED IS NOT NULL

| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_SM_CLOCK IS NOT NULL

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_CLOCK IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_mem_clk = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_CLOCK) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), UUID
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_CLOCK IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_mem_clk = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_CLOCK) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), UUID
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_XID_ERRORS IS NOT NULL AND DCGM_FI_DEV_XID_ERRORS > 0
| STATS occurrences = COUNT(*), last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY Hostname, UUID, modelName, err_code, err_msg
| SORT occurrences DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_XID_ERRORS IS NOT NULL AND DCGM_FI_DEV_XID_ERRORS > 0
| STATS occurrences = COUNT(*), last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY Hostname, UUID, modelName, err_code, err_msg
| SORT occurrences DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_temp = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP), avg_util = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL), avg_power = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE), avg_fb_used = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED), avg_fb_free = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE) BY Hostname, UUID, modelName, DCGM_FI_DRIVER_VERSION
| EVAL fb_used_pct = ROUND(avg_fb_used / (avg_fb_used + avg_fb_free) * 100.0, 1)
| SORT avg_temp DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_temp = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP), avg_util = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL), avg_power = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE), avg_fb_used = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED), avg_fb_free = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE) BY Hostname, UUID, modelName, DCGM_FI_DRIVER_VERSION
| EVAL fb_used_pct = ROUND(avg_fb_used / (avg_fb_used + avg_fb_free) * 100.0, 1)
| SORT avg_temp DESC
| LIMIT 100
